content.objective: Work Unit package schemaVersion 4.0.0을 유지하면서 versioned execution-state/v1, revision과 execution attempt lifecycle, stale review evidence invalidation 및 Git subject binding을 Work Unit manager와 실행 계약에 구현한다.

included: revision, attempt, invocation identity와 Git subject binding
retry, resume, Human rework의 atomic manager lifecycle semantics
current execution target과 일치하지 않는 pass, AI review, report와 Human approval 거부
동일 Work Unit branch와 linked worktree 재사용 계약
기존 done v4 history validation과 active v4 initialization boundary
VS 확장 Viewer가 소비할 version-aware JSON field documentation

excluded: 기존 done v4 Work Unit 일괄 migration 또는 history rewrite
VS Code extension 또는 Viewer UI 구현
Human-facing Markdown 또는 HTML report 생성
Work Unit 실행 결과의 Human 승인, merge, PR promotion 또는 deployment
기존 unrelated ready Work Unit의 execution-context repair

artifacts: manager-validated execution-state/v1 and immutable history contract
atomic retry, resume and rework lifecycle operations with invalidation
revision, attempt, invocationId and headCommit-bound evidence validation
worktree and codex exec orchestration guidance

content.value: Canonical outputs remain JSON. Human-facing report artifacts are legacy and must not be introduced.
Integration receipt registration remains orthogonal to lifecycle and may append to done without reviving semantic execution results.

content.risk: 이전 attempt의 passing result 또는 approval이 새 revision에 재사용될 수 있다.
content.mitigation: current execution-state tuple과 Git subject가 정확히 일치할 때만 review 및 done gate를 통과시킨다.
